title: Meiocarpidium lepidotum
taxonomy: Meiocarpidium lepidotum is classified as a plant species within the family Apiaceae, a group commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This classification places Meiocarpidium lepidotum among other plants that share similar characteristics and morphological features. The plant's classification is further refined to the genus Meiocarpidium, which is a monotypic genus containing only this single species. Within the kingdom Plantae, Meiocarpidium lepidotum is also assigned to the subkingdom Viridiplantae, indicating its status as a vascular plant. The specific classification of Meiocarpidium lepidotum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plant species within the Apiaceae family.
